title_zh: 深度药物发现平台识别出能够穿越血脑屏障的自噬增强剂用于阿尔茨海默病治疗

raw_data.title: Whole cross-sectional human ultrasound tomography
raw_data.abstract: Ultrasonography is a vital component of modern clinical care, with handheld probes routinely used for diagnostic imaging and procedural guidance. However, handheld ultrasound imaging is limited by factors such as the partial cross-sectional field of view, operator dependency, contact-induced distortion and lack of transmission contrast. Here we demonstrate a new system that enables whole cross-sectional ultrasound tomography of humans in both reflection and transmission modes. We generate two-dimensional images of the entire in vivo human cross-section in the abdomen and thighs with uniform in-plane resolution using a custom 512-element circular ultrasound receiver array and a rotating transmitter. Sequential scans with our system show strong agreement with clinical magnetic resonance imaging counterparts. To address unmet clinical needs, we explore two key applications. First, we observe abdominal adipose distributions in our images, enabling adipose thickness assessment without ionising radiation or mechanical deformation. Second, we demonstrate an approach for video-rate biopsy needle localization with respect to internal tissue features. These capabilities make whole cross-sectional ultrasound tomography a potential practical tool for clinical needs currently unmet by other modalities.

title_zh: 全身横断面人体超声断层成像
recommendation_text: 该研究提出了一种全新的全身超声断层成像系统，突破了传统手持超声的视野局限、操作者依赖性和组织接触形变等瓶颈。通过反射与透射双模式成像，首次实现了人体腹部和大腿完整截面的二维实时成像，图像分辨率与均匀性显著提升。对于神经科学领域读者而言，该技术虽非直接针对脑成像，但其无创、高穿透深度、低成本、可重复性强等特性，有望为外周神经、肌肉及血管系统的结构评估提供前所未有的高质量数据，并可能推动未来神经系统动态监测设备的范式革新。
reasoning: 论文主题为全身超声成像技术，与神经科学无直接相关，但作为高影响力方法，未来可能用于脑部或神经系统的无创成像研究。
feature_angle: 一种无电离辐射、无接触变形的全横截面超声断层成像技术，可实时引导活检并量化腹部脂肪分布。
key_strength: 首次实现人体全横截面超声断层成像，兼具反射和透射模式，空间分辨率均匀且与MRI高度一致，提供无创、无线辐射的脂肪厚度评估及视频率活检针导航。
key_limitation: 系统旋转发射器与512-element环形接收阵列的机械复杂度高，可能限制临床普及速度；目前仅验证腹部和腿部横截面，对颅骨等声窗困难区域（如大脑成像）适用性未证；未展示功能成像（如血流、弹性）或多维度神经解剖分析。
target_audience: 超声成像/生物医学工程研究者、介入放射科医师、肥胖及代谢疾病研究者、对无创活检导航方法感兴趣的神经科学家与系统生物学家
crossover_value: 神经科学研究者通常聚焦于脑部成像，但外周神经系统与中枢的交互是理解神经疾病（如神经病理性疼痛、糖尿病神经病变）的关键。本技术通过无接触、全场扫描的方式，能够以毫米级分辨率描绘外周神经及周围软组织的完整横断面结构，避免了传统超声的形变伪影。其透射模式还可提取组织声速、衰减等定量参数，这些参数在病理状态下（如水肿、纤维化）的变化可能提供全新的生物标志物。因此，尽管技术源头为超声医学工程，其应用于外周神经系统的潜力使其对神经科学具有跨界吸引力。
editor_note: 该论文发表于顶级工程与医学交叉期刊，技术成熟度高，虽非直接神经科学论文，但方法学创新和跨模态应用前景值得关注。

raw_data.title: CAR-neutrophils produced in vivo to treat glioma
raw_data.abstract: Despite their notable abundance in circulation and biological significance in the tumour microenvironment, direct genetic programming of neutrophils has been challenging. Here we develop a neutrophil-specific modified RNA translation platform, termed NeuSMRT, that enables the expression of chimeric antigen receptors (CARs) in primary neutrophils. NeuSMRT combines engineered extracellular vesicles or lipid nanoparticles for modified RNA delivery with a microRNA-responsive L7Ae:k-turn switch to restrict protein translation to neutrophils. In a syngeneic glioma model, CAR-neutrophils produced in vivo significantly inhibit tumour growth and prolong survival, accompanied by enhanced T cell recruitment and activation, and reduced immunosuppression of myeloid cells in the tumour microenvironment. CAR-neutrophils further enhance the efficacy of chemotherapy and CAR-T therapy. Furthermore, CAR-neutrophils display antitumour activities in a humanized glioblastoma mouse model. The feasibility and safety of NeuSMRT are also demonstrated in experimental dogs. These findings establish a programmable neutrophil platform for cancer immunotherapy.

title_zh: 体内产生的CAR-中性粒细胞治疗胶质瘤

feature_angle: 首次实现体内直接编程中性粒细胞为CAR-中性粒细胞，为胶质瘤免疫治疗开辟可编程中性粒细胞平台。
key_strength: 方法学创新突出：结合工程化细胞外囊泡/脂质纳米颗粒递送修饰RNA与microRNA响应开关，实现中性粒细胞特异性蛋白翻译，技术原创性高且具有临床转化潜力。
key_limitation: 突破性有限：CAR-中性粒细胞概念并非首次提出（已有体外CAR-N研究），体内编程虽新但未颠覆免疫治疗范式；神经科学领域贡献度间接（胶质瘤模型为应用场景，未深入神经免疫互作机制）。
target_audience: 肿瘤免疫治疗研究者、基因编辑与RNA治疗技术开发人员、胶质瘤转化医学团队。

raw_data.title: Direct RNA sequencing and signal alignment reveal RNA structure ensembles in a eukaryotic cell
raw_data.abstract: The extent to which an RNA folds into structure ensembles and how different structures in the ensemble regulate eukaryotic gene expression is not fully understood. Here, we coupled chemical probing with direct RNA sequencing to identify structure modifications along a single RNA molecule (sm-PORE-cupine). We used direct signal alignment in addition to base mapping to increase the percentage of mappable sequences and showed that Bernoulli mixture model clustering can separate structure ensembles accurately. We applied sm-PORE-cupine to identify isoform-specific structure ensembles along the SARS-CoV-2 genome and structure ensembles in the Candida albicans transcriptome. We observed that RNAs are more structurally homogeneous in vitro, at higher temperatures and in the 3′ untranslated regions of C. albicans . Structure ensembles are associated with changes in translation efficiency and decay in C. albicans , and we validated translation changes using reporter assays. sm-PORE-cupine expands the existing toolbox for studying RNA structure and function in diverse transcriptomes.

title_zh: 直接RNA测序和信号比对揭示真核细胞中的RNA结构集合
recommendation_text: 该研究通过耦合化学探针与直接RNA测序技术（sm-PORE-cupine），首次在真核细胞中实现了单RNA分子水平上结构异构体的系统解析。其利用伯努利混合模型聚类，精准区分了不同转录本异构体的结构组，为理解RNA折叠如何调控基因表达提供了全新视角。对于神经科学领域，该技术有望揭示神经元中可变剪接产物如何通过差异折叠影响突触可塑性和疾病相关蛋白表达，是结构转录组学与系统神经生物学交叉的重要进展。
reasoning: 该研究专注于RNA结构测序方法，与神经科学核心领域（脑、认知、计算神经科学）无直接关联，但其技术意义重大，未来可应用于神经科学中的RNA调控研究。
feature_angle: 单分子RNA结构构象群的直接观测技术，为理解RNA功能异质性提供全新维度
key_strength: 首创sm-PORE-cupine方法，将单分子化学探测与纳米孔直接RNA测序结合，首次在真核细胞中系统解析RNA结构构象群及其与翻译效率的因果关系
key_limitation: 技术通量需验证，构象群聚类依赖模型假设，在神经细胞复杂异构体中体内验证仍缺失，且主要基于真菌与病毒，向哺乳动物神经系统的迁移尚待证明
target_audience: RNA生物学家、系统与合成生物学家、计算生物学家、神经退行性疾病与RNA调控机制研究者
editor_note: 论文获评7.55分，属域外高影响。推荐语突出对神经科学的潜在价值，跨界价值说明强调方法学普适性与系统生物学启示。

raw_data.title: PinkyCaMP: an mScarlet-based calcium sensor with enhanced brightness, photostability and multiplexing capabilities
raw_data.abstract: Genetically encoded calcium (Ca 2+ ) indicators (GECIs) are essential tools for monitoring neuronal activity, but the performance of red fluorescent GECIs has remained limited. In particular, many red indicators are relatively dim, produce low signal-to-noise ratios and can undergo unwanted photoswitching when exposed to blue light, restricting their use in all-optical experiments that combine imaging with optogenetics or multicolor imaging. Here we show the development of PinkyCaMP, a Ca 2+ sensor based on the bright red fluorescent protein mScarlet. PinkyCaMP exhibits markedly improved brightness, photostability and signal-to-noise ratio compared to existing red GECIs, while remaining fully compatible with blue-light-based optogenetic and dual-color imaging approaches. PinkyCaMP is well-tolerated by neurons, showing no detectable toxicity or aggregation, both in vitro and in vivo. PinkyCaMP enables a broad spectrum of imaging modalities, including single-photon methods, such as fiber photometry, widefield imaging and miniature microscopy imaging, as well as two-photon imaging in awake mice.

raw_data.title: Transcriptomic and phenotypic convergence of neurodevelopmental disorder risk genes in vitro and in vivo
raw_data.abstract: Diverse risk genes have been identified for neurodevelopmental disorders (NDDs), but how these genes converge on similar biological pathways in neurons, and thus give rise to similar phenotypes, is unclear. Here we apply a pooled CRISPR approach to successfully target 23 NDD loss-of-function genes with roles in chromatin biology and examine convergent effects on gene expression across human induced pluripotent stem cell-derived neural progenitor cells, glutamatergic neurons and GABAergic neurons. Points of convergence vary between these cell types, with the greatest number of convergent genes and strongest convergent networks in mature glutamatergic neurons, where they broadly represent synaptic, epigenetic and, unexpectedly, mitochondrial pathways. The most convergent networks were observed between NDD genes with shared biological annotations, clinical associations and co-expression patterns in human post-mortem brain. Drugs that were predicted to reverse convergent transcriptomic signatures and/or arousal and sensory processing behaviors ameliorated behavioral phenotypes in zebrafish NDD gene mutants. These results suggest that convergent effects of NDD risk genes could provide clinically useful insights.

raw_data.title: The Hallmarks of Cancer: 25 years guiding discovery and therapy
raw_data.abstract: Twenty-five years after its publication, the Hallmarks of Cancer framework continues to illuminate tumor biology and drive therapeutic innovation. This special issue surveys how the concept has shaped our understanding of cancer, guided drug development, and evolved to incorporate new discoveries and address emerging challenges.

raw_data.title: Shared leadership, shared responsibility
raw_data.abstract: In choosing to merge two independent teams, we stepped into an unconventional model of co-leadership that reshaped our scientific lives. A clinician and a scientist leading together challenged academic norms, dissolved the loneliness of traditional principal investigator roles, and created a shared patient-centered vision for translational research. By embedding patients, carers, and high-performance coaching at our core, we built a culture defined not by individual burden but by collective responsibility, sustainability, and genuine collaboration. This is our story.

raw_data.title: Hallmarks of setting up a successful patient advocacy group
raw_data.abstract: Patient advocacy has the potential to contribute to effective cancer care with real-world impact, regardless of a country's socioeconomic status. Here, we asked representatives of patient advocacy groups for key considerations to overcome challenges when starting out in resource-limited settings. We are grateful to them for sharing their voices and for their relentless fight toward making cancer care more accessible.

raw_data.title: Hallmarks of cancer research: Enabling transformative discovery through global team science
raw_data.abstract: Since the original Hallmarks of Cancer, our understanding of the complexity of the disease has expanded dramatically. Researching cancer is no longer simply a question of ever more sophisticated experiments but of delivering science in an evolving and complex system. Here, we discuss how to support global team science and catalyze transformative discovery, drawing on our experience from the Cancer Grand Challenges initiative.

raw_data.title: Improving immunotherapy in solid tumors using FMT
raw_data.abstract: Recent clinical trials demonstrate that fecal microbiota transplantation (FMT) enhances first-line immune checkpoint inhibitor efficacy in renal cell carcinoma, cutaneous melanoma, and non-small cell lung cancer with acceptable safety. Benefit appears mediated by functional microbiome remodeling, depletion of deleterious taxa, and systemic immunometabolic modulation, supporting microbiome-directed therapeutic strategies for cancer immunotherapy.

raw_data.title: Tackling the complexity of cancer with generative models
raw_data.abstract: The Hallmarks of Cancer framework has played a seminal role in developing our understanding of cancer biology. By design, these hallmarks abstract cancer into a common set of functional capabilities. The hallmarks thus constitute an intentionally reductionist framework that has unified diverse observations and yielded valuable mechanistic insight, while leaving unresolved how these processes interact across scales. Complementary tools are therefore needed to capture cancer's inherently complex, multimodal, and multiscale nature. Here, we posit that generative models, built on the recent advances of artificial intelligence, are the key technology to capture this complexity and to thereby improve how we diagnose, understand, and intervene in cancer. Specifically, because of their ability to recognize complex patterns, process unstructured inputs, and synthesize multimodal inputs, generative models are poised to usher in a new era of biological discovery and clinical care. Ultimately, we envision a synergistic cycle wherein generative models of cancer and the Hallmarks of Cancer complement one another, the former driving hypothesis generation and discovery and the latter guiding the prioritization and development of new measurement tools.

title_zh: 利用生成模型应对癌症的复杂性
recommendation_text: 该文系统阐述了生成模型（如变分自编码器、生成对抗网络及自回归模型）在解析癌症多尺度复杂性中的潜力，并提出其有望桥接分子、细胞与组织层面的异质性数据。对于神经科学研究者而言，文中强调的跨模态整合策略（如将基因组、蛋白质组、组织病理与临床数据联合建模）可直接迁移至脑疾病的异质性解析——例如结合神经影像、单细胞转录组及电生理数据刻画阿尔茨海默病或胶质瘤的动态演进。生成模型在模拟非线性相互作用与生成反事实扰动方面的优势，将为神经系统疾病机制假设检验提供全新范式。
reasoning: 论文核心主题为癌症生物学，非直接神经科学范畴，但生成模型作为AI前沿技术，其方法与框架未来可迁移至神经科学多模态数据整合与系统建模，具有跨领域高影响力。
feature_angle: 提出生成模型与癌症标志互补框架，强调多尺度、多模态整合方法对生物医学的范式革新。
key_strength: 概念上大胆融合生成AI与经典癌症生物学，提出了一个具有高度迁移性和启发性的协同研究范式，对复杂系统建模有指导意义。
key_limitation: 属于观点/前瞻性论文，缺乏具体算法实现或严格验证；作者在AI+生物学的实证影响力有限，且未涉及神经科学特异性案例。
target_audience: 计算系统生物学家、AI驱动的跨学科研究者、癌症生物学方法论开发者，以及关注复杂系统建模的神经科学方法论学者。
crossover_value: 癌症生物学与神经科学共享多模态、多尺度复杂系统的核心挑战。该文提出的生成模型框架——特别是通过隐空间表征捕捉跨层次交互的能力——对神经退行性疾病、脑肿瘤及精神疾病研究具有直接参考价值。例如，类似方法可用于整合神经影像与分子特征，解析表型异质性来源；或通过潜在空间扰动模拟药物反应，加速靶点发现。文中关于模型可解释性与生物先验融合的讨论，也为神经科学领域的因果推断提供了方法论启示。
editor_note: 尽管论文背景聚焦癌症，其方法论框架（如条件生成模型、变分推断）及对复杂系统建模的普适性思考（如尺度桥接、多模态融合）极具跨领域参考价值。建议神经科学读者重点阅读‘Generative models across scales’部分，尤其是图3对多模态数据协同生成的示意。

raw_data.title: Accelerating discovery of cancer causes for prevention in the era of rising early-onset cancers
raw_data.abstract: Cancer in younger adults is rising globally, with notable birth-cohort effects. This epidemiological shift underscores the urgent need to accelerate the identification of novel causes and underlying biological networks, with the aim of translating these insights into prevention and interception strategies. In this perspective, we revisit the major milestones in the discovery of cancer causes and outline challenges that hinder progress. To address these challenges, we advocate closer integration of epidemiologic and mechanistic studies and propose three interconnected frameworks that extend current epidemiologic approaches: a tissue ecosystem-anchored framework for cancer cause discovery, a biological state-based framework for precision cancer risk assessment, and a dynamic framework to characterize cancer preventability. This roadmap aims to stimulate conceptual, resource, and methodological advances to accelerate cancer etiology research and prevention in the era of rising early-onset cancers.

paper.title: Accelerating discovery of cancer causes for prevention in the era of rising early-onset cancers
paper.abstract: Cancer in younger adults is rising globally, with notable birth-cohort effects. This epidemiological shift underscores the urgent need to accelerate the identification of novel causes and underlying biological networks, with the aim of translating these insights into prevention and interception strategies. In this perspective, we revisit the major milestones in the discovery of cancer causes and outline challenges that hinder progress. To address these challenges, we advocate closer integration of epidemiologic and mechanistic studies and propose three interconnected frameworks that extend current epidemiologic approaches: a tissue ecosystem-anchored framework for cancer cause discovery, a biological state-based framework for precision cancer risk assessment, and a dynamic framework to characterize cancer preventability. This roadmap aims to stimulate conceptual, resource, and methodological advances to accelerate cancer etiology research and prevention in the era of rising early-onset cancers.

title_zh: 在早发性癌症上升时代加速发现癌症病因以促进预防
recommendation_text: 本文针对全球早发性癌症发病率上升的流行病学转变，提出了加速发现癌症病因和潜在生物学网络的框架。尽管并非神经科学专论，但文章强调了流行病学与机制研究整合的策略，此类方法论对神经退行性疾病、脑肿瘤等领域的病因探索具有借鉴价值，尤其适用于研究环境因素与神经疾病关联的读者。
reasoning: 该论文聚焦癌症流行病学与病因发现，不直接涉及脑或神经系统，但早发性癌症的生物学机制（如组织生态、生物状态变化）与神经-免疫-内分泌网络交互，可能间接影响神经系统健康与疾病研究，具有跨学科高影响潜力。
feature_angle: 从癌症病因发现到神经科学：流行病学-机制整合与生态系统框架的可迁移范式
key_strength: 提出了三个可操作的概念框架（组织生态系统、生物状态、动态可预防性），高度跨学科且方法学通用，直接启发神经退行性疾病中的病因网络与预防策略研究
key_limitation: 本质为观点性综述，缺乏实证数据和具体工具验证；框架描述较为宏观，对神经科学领域的具体迁移路径未详细展开
target_audience: 系统生物学家、计算神经科学家、研究慢性疾病病因机制与预防策略的跨学科团队
crossover_value: 神经科学研究者可从文中的多学科方法获益，例如：1）通过学习出生队列效应分析技术，优化神经发育障碍或阿尔茨海默病的病因筛查；2）借鉴其提出的整合框架，将临床流行病学数据与分子机制验证相结合，提升脑疾病预防研究的转化效率。本文为扩展领域外的病因学思维提供了实用路线图。
editor_note: 论文得分8.35/10，属于跨学科高影响研究，虽非神经科学直接相关，但其方法论框架对预防性神经科学研究有启发意义。

raw_data.title: Hallmarks of cancer—Then and now, and beyond
raw_data.abstract: Hanahan revisits the evolving framework of cancer hallmarks, synthesizing 25 years of conceptual refinement into a multidimensional view of tumor biology. This review highlights how aberrant capabilities, enabling traits, microenvironmental players, and systemic interactions converge to drive tumorigenesis and proposes that mechanism-guided co-targeting of hallmarks may offer promising therapeutic strategies.

paper.title: Hallmarks of cancer—Then and now, and beyond
paper.abstract: Hanahan revisits the evolving framework of cancer hallmarks, synthesizing 25 years of conceptual refinement into a multidimensional view of tumor biology. title_zh: 癌症的标志——过去、现在与未来
recommendation_text: 这篇由Hanahan撰写的里程碑式综述，系统更新了25年来'癌症标志'概念的演化，从分子异常到微环境与系统性互作，构建了多维肿瘤生物学框架。对于神经科学领域读者，该文提供了理解胶质瘤、颅内转移等脑肿瘤复杂性的关键概念工具——如免疫逃逸、基因组不稳定与神经-免疫串扰的交叉点。尤其值得注意的是，作者提出的'机制引导共靶向'策略，为开发针对脑肿瘤微环境中多重标志的联合疗法提供了理论蓝图，值得神经肿瘤学家和系统生物学家关注。
reasoning: 该论文聚焦于癌症生物学标志框架的演化，未涉及脑科学、神经科学或认知科学的核心议题，但肿瘤生物学机制（如微环境互作、全身系统影响）对神经肿瘤学、神经免疫交叉领域有潜在推动价值。
feature_angle: 癌症标志概念的25年进化全景与跨疾病机制通用性启示
key_strength: Douglas Hanahan作为该领域奠基人，系统性整合并扩展了癌症多维特征框架，为理解复杂疾病提供了高度抽象的机制模块，具有跨肿瘤类型的普适性和启发其他疾病研究的范式价值。
key_limitation: 作为综述，缺乏原创实验数据支撑；部分新提出的标志（如非突变表观遗传重编程、多态性微生物组）在神经科学中的直接对应关系尚需验证。
target_audience: 神经肿瘤学、系统神经生物学、计算生物学研究者，以及关注跨疾病机制迁移的科学家。
crossover_value: 尽管本文聚焦肿瘤生物学，但其'标志'体系为神经退行性疾病、神经发育障碍等领域的复杂系统研究提供了可迁移的范式——通过识别可靶向的核心机制特征（如蛋白稳态失衡、代谢重编程），促进跨疾病机理整合。此外，肿瘤微环境中免疫与神经信号的互作模式，对理解脑稳态和病理具有直接启示。
editor_note: 本文为'域外高影响'分类，其理论框架的通用性对神经科学中复杂疾病机制研究具有重要参考价值。

raw_data.title: Targeting genomic instability in cancer
raw_data.abstract: Genomic instability is a defining feature of cancer, which arises when the cellular systems that maintain DNA integrity falter, enabling the accumulation of genetic and epigenetic alterations that drive malignant transformation. It is both the architect of cancer's evolution and its Achilles' heel. Targeting genomic instability has reshaped oncology: first through systemic chemotherapy and external beam radiation and then with poly(ADP-ribose) polymerase (PARP) inhibitors in homologous recombination repair-deficient tumors and other DNA damage response targets. Recently, tumor-targeted DNA-damaging platforms, namely antibody-drug conjugates (ADCs) and radiopharmaceuticals, have emerged alongside modern precision medicine strategies to optimize patient selection, develop rational combinations, and widen the therapeutic index.

title_zh: 靶向癌症中的基因组不稳定性
reasoning: 文章聚焦癌症基因组不稳定性及其治疗策略，与神经科学无直接关联，但DNA损伤修复机制及靶向疗法（如PARP抑制剂）在神经退行性疾病（如阿尔茨海默病）中具有潜在应用，可能推动神经科学领域发展。
feature_angle: 从DNA损伤修复到靶向递送：癌症基因组不稳定性治疗范式的系统综述
key_strength: 全面梳理了从传统疗法到PARP抑制剂、ADC及放射药物的现代精准医学演化路径，提供了一个清晰的领域全景图
key_limitation: 对神经科学等非癌症领域的迁移性较低，缺乏对DNA损伤修复机制在神经系统疾病中的讨论或跨学科应用视角
target_audience: 肿瘤学研究人员、药物开发人员及对癌症基因组不稳定性感兴趣的临床医生

raw_data.title: A recipe for chaos: Extrachromosomal DNA and the hallmarks of cancer
raw_data.abstract: Some aggressive cancers exhibit a level of rapid genome change and therapy resistance that is difficult to explain. Research over the past decade has shown that extrachromosomal DNA (ecDNA) can be the cause. When oncogenic genetic elements untether from chromosomes and no longer follow Mendelian inheritance, genomic chaos and accelerated evolution ensue, generating unique ecDNA biology and non-traditional therapeutic vulnerabilities distinct from traditional mutation-targeting approaches. Here, we put forward a holistic view where ecDNA is integrated into the broader Hallmarks of Cancer framework to better understand the problem and chart a path forward.

paper.title: A recipe for chaos: Extrachromosomal DNA and the hallmarks of cancer
paper.abstract: Some aggressive cancers exhibit a level of rapid genome change and therapy resistance that is difficult to explain. Research over the past decade has shown that extrachromosomal DNA (ecDNA) can be the cause. When oncogenic genetic elements untether from chromosomes and no longer follow Mendelian inheritance, genomic chaos and accelerated evolution ensue, generating unique ecDNA biology and non-traditional therapeutic vulnerabilities distinct from traditional mutation-targeting approaches. Here, we put forward a holistic view where ecDNA is integrated into the broader Hallmarks of Cancer framework to better understand the problem and chart a path forward.

title_zh: 混沌秘方：染色体外DNA与癌症标志
recommendation_text: 尽管本文聚焦于肿瘤学，但其揭示的ecDNA驱动的基因组快速不稳定性与治疗抵抗机制，为神经科学中理解神经胶质瘤、髓母细胞瘤等侵袭性脑瘤的加速进化提供了全新视角。神经科学家可借鉴这一框架，探索神经发育与肿瘤发生中非孟德尔遗传元件的作用，尤其是在类似ecDNA的环状DNA是否参与神经元基因组镶嵌性、神经可塑性或神经退行性疾病中的体细胞突变积累。本文将ecDNA整合至癌症标志的全景观点，启发我们重新审视脑肿瘤异质性与治疗耐药的动态根源。
reasoning: 论文聚焦癌症基因组不稳定性及ecDNA机制，与脑/神经科学无直接关联，但癌生物学中的基因组适应性和耐药机制对神经肿瘤研究及系统生物学具有跨领域参考价值。
feature_angle: 将ecDNA驱动的基因组混沌整合为癌症标志，揭示非孟德尔遗传在肿瘤进化中的核心地位
key_strength: 系统性地将ecDNA这一新兴机制嵌入经典的Hallmarks of Cancer框架，为该领域提供了整合性理论升级，并指出非传统治疗靶点
key_limitation: ecDNA在神经肿瘤（如胶质母细胞瘤）中已有较多研究，但本文拓展至普遍癌症框架时，缺乏对神经系统中ecDNA异质性与功能动态的具体机制阐述
target_audience: 癌症生物学研究者、计算基因组学与系统生物学家、神经肿瘤学专家
crossover_value: 对于专注脑肿瘤或神经基因组稳定性的研究者，本文揭示了ecDNA作为基因组混乱引擎的新机制，直接挑战了传统遗传学对脑癌进化的理解。该发现对开发针对脑胶质瘤、室管膜瘤等难治性肿瘤的非传统治疗策略具有潜在借鉴意义，并可能拓展我们对神经元体细胞基因组动态变化的认知。
editor_note: 作为域外高影响推荐，本文为神经科学引入了一个跨学科概念——ecDNA驱动的非遵循孟德尔遗传的基因组进化，有望促进脑肿瘤生物学与基础神经基因组学的交叉研究。

raw_data.title: Cell death in cancer
raw_data.abstract: "Evasion of cell death" is a hallmark of cancer, enabling transformed cells to withstand oncogenic and therapeutic stress. Restoring cancer cell death is an appealing strategy but requires a deep understanding of cell death programs. Over the past two decades, the cell death field has expanded from apoptosis to include necroptosis, pyroptosis, ferroptosis, and other emerging programs, reshaping cancer biology and revealing therapeutic opportunities. While apoptosis remains the primary radiation- and chemotherapy-induced cell death program, non-apoptotic programs can drive inflammatory responses and orchestrate the interplay among tumor, stroma, and immune components, influencing immunotherapy outcomes. Ferroptosis, an iron-dependent, lipid peroxidation-driven cell death modality, lacks a canonical induction signal and arises from perturbations in lipid, iron, and redox metabolism. This review presents a unified framework for understanding the roles of major cell death programs in cancer development, progression, and treatment response, as well as addressing resistance to cancer cell death and immune suppression. "Our bodies are made of cells that live, and just as surely, of cells that must die." -S. Brenner.

paper.title: Cell death in cancer
paper.abstract: "Evasion of cell death" is a hallmark of cancer, enabling transformed cells to withstand oncogenic and therapeutic stress. Restoring cancer cell death is an appealing strategy but requires a deep understanding of cell death programs. Over the past two decades, the cell death field has expanded from apoptosis to include necroptosis, pyroptosis, ferroptosis, and other emerging programs, reshaping cancer biology and revealing therapeutic opportunities. While apoptosis remains the primary radiation- and chemotherapy-induced cell death program, non-apoptotic programs can drive inflammatory responses and orchestrate the interplay among tumor, stroma, and immune components, influencing immunotherapy outcomes. Ferroptosis, an iron-dependent, lipid peroxidation-driven cell death modality, lacks a canonical induction signal and arises from perturbations in lipid, iron, and redox metabolism. This review presents a unified framework for understanding the roles of major cell death programs in cancer development, progression, and treatment response, as well as addressing resistance to cancer cell death and immune suppression. "Our bodies are made of cells that live, and just as surely, of cells that must die." -S. Brenner.

title_zh: 癌细胞死亡
recommendation_text: 本文系统综述了癌细胞通过逃避细胞死亡实现生存与耐药的机制，涵盖了凋亡、坏死性凋亡、焦亡、铁死亡等多样化的细胞死亡程序，并探讨了其在癌症治疗中的靶向潜力。对于神经科学研究者而言，理解肿瘤微环境中细胞死亡与炎症的交互作用，有助于揭示神经退行性疾病、中风及神经炎症中的类似调控机制。尤其是非凋亡性死亡途径（如焦亡）引发的免疫激活，可能为脑肿瘤免疫治疗提供新思路。
reasoning: 文章主题为癌细胞死亡机制，不直接涉及神经科学，但细胞死亡程序（如铁死亡、凋亡等）在神经退行性疾病和脑损伤中具有核心重要性，可能驱动神经科学治疗策略创新。
feature_angle: 系统整合细胞死亡程序（凋亡、坏死性凋亡、焦亡、铁死亡）在癌症中的多维作用，为跨疾病细胞死亡调控提供统一理论框架。
key_strength: 由多位领域顶尖学者（Strasser、Conrad等）联合撰写，全面且前沿地梳理了不同细胞死亡方式在肿瘤发生、免疫逃逸及治疗抵抗中的协同与对抗机制，尤其对铁死亡的代谢驱动机制有深度阐述。
key_limitation: 作为一篇综述，缺乏原创性实验数据；对神经退行性疾病中类似细胞死亡程序的交叉讨论不足，限制了其在神经科学领域的直接迁移价值。
target_audience: 癌症生物学与细胞死亡机制研究者，关注免疫治疗与铁死亡交叉领域的科学家，以及希望将细胞死亡调控机制引入神经退行性疾病（如阿尔茨海默病、帕金森病）研究的计算与系统生物学家。
crossover_value: 尽管本文直接面向癌症生物学，但其所总结的细胞死亡调控网络——特别是非凋亡途径的炎症触发机制——对于神经科学领域具有重要启示。神经退行性疾病（如阿尔茨海默病、帕金森病）中的神经元死亡常伴随神经炎症，而癌症研究中发现的铁死亡、焦亡等程序性死亡通路在神经病理中同样关键。此外，理解癌细胞如何规避死亡可类比于神经干细胞或胶质瘤细胞在脑内的生存策略，为跨学科治疗靶点的发现提供共同框架。
editor_note: 论文为领域内高影响力综述，覆盖最新细胞死亡图谱，对交叉研究者具参考价值。

raw_data.title: Senescence in cancer: Hallmarks, paradoxes, and therapeutic promise
raw_data.abstract: Cellular senescence is a conserved stress-responsive program defined by durable proliferative arrest and extensive remodeling of chromatin, metabolism, intercellular signaling, and immune interactions. Initially described as a barrier to unlimited cell division, senescence is now recognized as a pleiotropic and heterogeneous biological process with roles in development, tissue repair, immune surveillance, tumor suppression, aging, fibrosis, and cancer progression. Despite its broad relevance, senescence remains challenging to define operationally, as its molecular features, functional outputs, and physiological consequences vary across cell types, tissues, and stimuli. This review summarizes core hallmarks of senescence while synthesizing how these features are differentially engaged, diversified, and repurposed across biological contexts. Focusing on cancer, we discuss how senescence influences tumor initiation, evolution, and therapeutic response through both cell-intrinsic and microenvironmental mechanisms. We further evaluate emerging strategies to therapeutically modulate senescence, highlighting both opportunities and unresolved challenges for precision intervention.

title_zh: 衰老在癌症中的：标志、悖论与治疗前景
recommendation_text: 该综述系统阐述了细胞衰老在癌症中的双重角色——既是肿瘤抑制的屏障，又在特定条件下促进肿瘤进展。对于神经科学研究者，理解衰老细胞的异质性及其与免疫系统的交互，有助于探索神经退行性疾病中衰老神经元的类似机制，并为脑肿瘤（如胶质瘤）的微环境调控提供新视角。文章提出的治疗性干预策略（如senolytics）亦可能启发神经衰老领域的研究方向。
reasoning: 文章聚焦癌症衰老，非神经科学核心，但衰老机制（细胞周期停滞、染色质重塑、代谢和免疫相互作用）与神经退行性疾病、脑衰老及胶质瘤等神经肿瘤学密切相关，可能推动神经科学对衰老相关疾病的理解。
feature_angle: 系统解析细胞衰老在癌症中的双重角色，提供跨疾病领域的衰老调控理论框架
key_strength: 整合衰老异质性与癌症演化，提出治疗性干预的精准策略展望
key_limitation: 对神经科学领域的直接迁移点较少，缺乏与神经退行性疾病衰老机制的深度交叉
target_audience: 癌症生物学、衰老与再生医学、肿瘤免疫学研究者
crossover_value: 尽管本文聚焦癌症，但其揭示的衰老程序在细胞可塑性、染色质重塑和免疫信号串扰中的核心机制，与神经系统中神经元衰老、小胶质细胞老化及神经炎症高度相关。神经科学家可借鉴其操作定义衰老细胞的方法论，以及干预衰老驱动病理的转化思路。
editor_note: 评分7.0/10表明高质量，但需注意其综述性质与领域特异性。推荐作为跨学科启发性读物。

raw_data.title: Targeting angiogenesis: Lessons from 25 years of normalizing tumor vasculature
raw_data.abstract: Tumors acquire blood vessels primarily via sprouting angiogenesis and co-option of pre-existing host vasculature, but also via intussusception, vasculogenesis from bone-marrow-derived progenitors, vascular mimicry, and endothelial transdifferentiation. The abnormal structure and function of these vessels, resulting from an imbalance between pro- and anti-angiogenic signaling as well as from the physical forces, impair the delivery and efficacy of therapeutics. We review the evolving narrative of targeting angiogenesis from starving tumors to vascular normalization as a therapeutic principle and highlight recent spatial-omics revelations and the emerging role of neural, microbial, hormonal, and chronological factors. We elaborate on the molecular mechanisms of tumor vessel formation, how dysfunctional vessels cause an abnormal tumor microenvironment characterized by hypoxia, low pH, elevated fluid pressure, and immunosuppression, and how vascular normalization enhances the delivery and efficacy of various therapies, including immunotherapies, and has formed the basis of emerging strategies and novel therapeutic agents to improve patient outcomes.

title_zh: 靶向血管生成：25年肿瘤血管正常化治疗的启示
recommendation_text: 这篇综述系统回顾了25年来肿瘤血管生成研究从‘饥饿肿瘤’到‘血管正常化’的范式转变，揭示了血管结构异常对药物递送和治疗效果的深刻影响。对于神经科学研究者，该文提供了理解脑肿瘤（如胶质母细胞瘤）中异常血管形成及其与微环境互作的关键框架，并强调了血管正常化策略在改善免疫治疗和化学治疗递送中的潜力。文中讨论的物理力与信号失衡机制，为研发针对脑肿瘤血管的精准干预提供了重要理论基础。
reasoning: 该论文专注于肿瘤血管生成的分子机制和治疗策略，虽非直接涉及脑或神经科学，但肿瘤血管正常化对脑肿瘤治疗、血脑屏障通透性调控等神经肿瘤学领域有重要启示，且其提及的神经因素可能影响肿瘤微环境，具有跨学科推动潜力。
feature_angle: 肿瘤血管正常化原理的全景综述，揭示神经、微生物、激素与时间因素对血管微环境的调控，为神经科学中的血脑屏障与神经血管单元研究提供可迁移的理论框架
key_strength: 对25年领域进展的系统提炼，融合最新空间组学与跨因子调控（神经/微生物/激素/昼夜节律），将血管生物学从‘被动营养管道’升级为多系统交互的主动调控枢纽
key_limitation: 综述性质，缺乏原创实验数据；对‘神经因素’的具体分子证据与神经回路层面的整合仍较初步，未深入讨论脑血管病的直接类比
target_audience: 肿瘤生物学与血管生物学家、神经科学家（尤其关注血脑屏障、神经血管耦合、胶质瘤微环境）、计算系统生物学家（空间组学与多因子网络建模）
crossover_value: 神经科学领域常聚焦神经血管单元在脑疾病中的作用，而肿瘤血管生成研究提供了超越肿瘤学的通用原理——异常血管如何通过结构畸形和功能紊乱影响组织灌注、药物分布及免疫细胞浸润。这些机制对于理解脑缺血、神经退行性疾病中的血管病变极具启发性，尤其是‘血管正常化’策略可能为修复脑内血脑屏障损伤提供新思路。
editor_note: 本文属于域外高影响论文，虽不直接研究神经类疾病，但其核心机制（血管结构与功能调控）与神经血管病理学高度相关，推荐给关注脑肿瘤微环境、血脑屏障及神经系统血管病变的研究者。

raw_data.title: Mapping intratumor heterogeneity across layers for advancing immunotherapy
raw_data.abstract: Intratumor heterogeneity (ITH) encompasses genetic, epigenetic, transcriptional, proteomic, and immunopeptidomic diversity. Beyond genetic heterogeneity, it is increasingly clear that non-mutational heterogeneity and plasticity generate dynamic cancer cell states with distinct immune visibility. These layers of complexity converge on the immunopeptidome, the repertoire of peptides displayed by major histocompatibility complex molecules through which tumor cells are surveyed by T cells. Variation in antigen processing, presentation, and peptide abundance across cancer clones and cell states yields spatially and temporally distinct immunological niches that shape immune recognition and therapeutic response. Here, we summarize how multidimensional ITH manifests across cancer types and constrains immunotherapy efficacy. We propose that integrating measurements across layers is a promising direction for improving biomarker identification and informing more precise immune-based treatment strategies.

paper.title: Mapping intratumor heterogeneity across layers for advancing immunotherapy
paper.abstract: Intratumor heterogeneity (ITH) encompasses genetic, epigenetic, transcriptional, proteomic, and immunopeptidomic diversity. Beyond genetic heterogeneity, it is increasingly clear that non-mutational heterogeneity and plasticity generate dynamic cancer cell states with distinct immune visibility. These layers of complexity converge on the immunopeptidome, the repertoire of peptides displayed by major histocompatibility complex molecules through which tumor cells are surveyed by T cells. Variation in antigen processing, presentation, and peptide abundance across cancer clones and cell states yields spatially and temporally distinct immunological niches that shape immune recognition and therapeutic response. Here, we summarize how multidimensional ITH manifests across cancer types and constrains immunotherapy efficacy. We propose that integrating measurements across layers is a promising direction for improving biomarker identification and informing more precise immune-based treatment strategies.

title_zh: 跨层次解析瘤内异质性以推进免疫治疗
recommendation_text: 对于神经科学领域读者，本论文揭示了肿瘤异质性如何通过非遗传机制（如表观遗传重编程）调控免疫肽组的动态变化，进而影响T细胞免疫监视。这些机制与神经发育中的细胞状态可塑性及神经系统肿瘤（如胶质瘤）的免疫逃逸高度相关。文中讨论的单细胞分辨率下的抗原呈递变异分析框架，可启发我们理解神经系统疾病中神经元、胶质细胞与免疫细胞的互作网络。尤其对于从事神经退行性疾病或脑肿瘤免疫治疗的研究者，该研究的跨层整合策略提供了方法学借鉴。
reasoning: 论文聚焦肿瘤免疫治疗中的瘤内异质性，虽与脑/神经科学无直接核心关联，但其揭示的免疫微环境复杂性和非突变可塑性机制对胶质母细胞瘤等脑肿瘤的免疫治疗策略具有重要启示，属于高影响域外研究。
feature_angle: 跨层次解析肿瘤内异质性对免疫微环境的影响，为理解复杂系统异质性提供范式参考
key_strength: 系统性地整合遗传、表观、转录、蛋白质组和免疫肽组多维度数据，揭示肿瘤免疫逃逸的动态机制，并强调免疫肽组作为异质性汇聚枢纽的关键角色
key_limitation: 主要聚焦肿瘤免疫领域，与神经科学的直接关联较弱，论文中缺乏对神经退行性疾病或神经胶质瘤等交叉应用的明确讨论，概念迁移需谨慎
target_audience: 肿瘤免疫学家、计算系统生物学家、关注异质性与免疫治疗精准策略的跨学科研究者
editor_note: 论文得分7.15/10，属于领域内的高水平研究，但其核心主题聚焦于肿瘤免疫，未直接涉及神经机制，故分类为‘域外高影响’，并通过跨界价值说明强调其对神经科学的启示。

raw_data.title: Cancer ecosystems: A dynamic interplay across scales
raw_data.abstract: Tumors evolve within complex, adaptive ecosystems that operate across spatial, temporal, and systemic scales. Within each tumor microenvironment, numerous diverse cell populations assemble into specialized niches that are continually shaped by systemic physiology, environmental inputs, and therapeutic pressure. Beyond the local microenvironment, cancer progression is governed by the host macroenvironment, where intrinsic biological determinants intersect with modifiable factors to collectively impact physiological fitness and tissue resilience. Here, we propose a multi-scale framework that unites tumor biology with organismal physiology and reframes therapy from eliminating malignant cells in isolation to reprogramming the cellular, vascular, and systemic networks that sustain disease. We highlight emerging approaches that aim to restore physiological equilibrium, spanning from spatial multi-omics and AI-driven pathology to immune-vascular normalization and physiological conditioning. Together, these dimensions define an integrative vision for precision oncology that bridges discovery and intervention to achieve durable and ultimately curative cancer therapy.

title_zh: 癌症生态系统：跨尺度的动态相互作用
recommendation_text: 这篇发表于高影响力期刊的综述提出了一个多尺度框架，将肿瘤视为一个动态的、跨层次的复杂生态系统。对于神经科学研究者而言，该框架极具启发性：它揭示了局部微环境（如神经元-胶质细胞互作）如何受全身生理状态（如代谢、免疫）和外界干预（如药物、行为）的系统性调控。这种从局部到整体的系统级视角，与神经科学中理解脑功能和疾病（如神经退行性疾病、脑肿瘤）的复杂性高度契合。读者可借鉴其‘生态位构建’和‘跨尺度反馈’概念，重新审视神经疾病中从分子、突触到神经网络乃至行为的多层次整合机制。推荐给关注系统生物学和疾病复杂性的神经科学家。
reasoning: 该论文聚焦肿瘤生态学与系统生物学，非直接脑科学或神经科学内容，但其所提出的多尺度框架和系统性网络重编程概念对理解神经系统疾病（如脑瘤、神经退行性疾病）的系统性病理机制具有重要启发和跨域应用潜力。
feature_angle: 将肿瘤生态学从局部微环境扩展到系统生理学，提出了可迁移到神经退行性疾病和脑肿瘤研究的跨尺度整合框架。
key_strength: 提出了一个超越传统肿瘤微环境视角的统一多尺度框架，整合了宿主宏观环境、全身生理网络和治疗重编程、对神经科学中的系统脑网络和神经退行性疾病微环境研究极具启发价值。
key_limitation: 概念框架为主，缺乏具体的定量模型或可验证的神经科学转化假设，对计算和系统生物学家的直接工具性较弱。
target_audience: 肿瘤生物学家、神经肿瘤学家、系统生理学家、计算生物学研究者、AI驱动的病理学与空间组学专家
crossover_value: 本文的核心价值在于为神经科学提供了一种超越传统分子通路思维的研究范式：将神经系统疾病（如脑瘤、神经退行性疾病）视为适应性的生态系统。这一视角有助于整合来自神经元活动、胶质细胞、血管和免疫系统的异质性信息，阐明疾病如何通过局部生态位的重塑和全身性生理网络的反馈来进展和抵抗治疗。对于构建多尺度计算模型（如从突触可塑性到全脑网络）和设计跨模态干预策略具有重要的启发意义。
editor_note: 论文虽未直接聚焦神经科学，但其提出的系统级分析框架对研究脑肿瘤、神经炎症及复杂神经精神疾病的机制具有直接的方法学借鉴价值。推荐作为跨学科方法论的参考阅读。

raw_data.title: Cancer neuroscience: The past, the present, and the road ahead
raw_data.abstract: Both the nervous system and cancer-intrinsic neural features can govern cancer initiation, growth, progression, metastasis, and treatment resistance, while cancer can likewise influence the nervous system, promoting neural reprogramming and neuropsychiatric symptoms that worsen patient outcomes. The field of cancer neuroscience seeks to unravel this complex neuro-cancer crosstalk and holds the promise to develop neuroscience-instructed cancer therapies that improve disease control and quality of life. Here, we summarize the key discoveries of neuro-cancer crosstalk to date, including neuron-to-cancer synapses and paracrine and neuro-immuno-oncological interactions, and then explore emerging topics such as downstream effects on cancer cell pathophysiology, circadian influences, brain-body-cancer communication, and neural regulation of the metastatic cascade and the tumor microenvironment. Finally, we distill overarching principles, highlight relevant ongoing research, and outline conclusions to guide the development of cancer neuroscience, proposing hypotheses for future experimental validation.

paper.title: Cancer neuroscience: The past, the present, and the road ahead
paper.abstract: Both the nervous system and cancer-intrinsic neural features can govern cancer initiation, growth, progression, metastasis, and treatment resistance, while cancer can likewise influence the nervous system, promoting neural reprogramming and neuropsychiatric symptoms that worsen patient outcomes. The field of cancer neuroscience seeks to unravel this complex neuro-cancer crosstalk and holds the promise to develop neuroscience-instructed cancer therapies that improve disease control and quality of life. Here, we summarize the key discoveries of neuro-cancer crosstalk to date, including neuron-to-cancer synapses and paracrine and neuro-immuno-oncological interactions, and then explore emerging topics such as downstream effects on cancer cell pathophysiology, circadian influences, brain-body-cancer communication, and neural regulation of the metastatic cascade and the tumor microenvironment. Finally, we distill overarching principles, highlight relevant ongoing research, and outline conclusions to guide the development of cancer neuroscience, proposing hypotheses for future experimental validation.

title_zh: 癌症神经科学：过去、现在与未来之路
reasoning: 论文系统综述神经系统与癌症之间的双向调控机制（包括神经-肿瘤突触、旁分泌及神经-免疫-肿瘤相互作用），直接涉及神经元与癌细胞的分子信号、神经可塑性及神经重编程，属于分子与细胞神经科学核心范畴。
feature_angle: 系统整合神经科学与肿瘤学，为新兴的癌症神经科学领域提供全景式路线图
key_strength: 首次全面且前瞻性地梳理了神经-肿瘤交互的多层次机制（突触、旁分泌、免疫、昼夜节律、脑-体轴），并提出了可验证的关键假说，极具领域引导价值。
key_limitation: 作为综述，不包含原始实验数据，证据强度依赖于所引用的文献，方法学评分因此受限；部分假设尚缺乏直接实验验证，前瞻性内容为主观推断。
target_audience: 神经科学家、肿瘤生物学家、计算与系统生物学家、神经肿瘤学临床研究者及药理学专家

raw_data.title: Hallmarks of liver cancer: Therapeutic implications
raw_data.abstract: The hallmarks of cancer, first proposed in 2000, have since provided a unified framework for understanding the complexity of carcinogenesis. This conceptual model has profoundly influenced the treatment landscape of primary liver cancer, which includes hepatocellular carcinoma (HCC, ∼85%) and intrahepatic cholangiocarcinoma (iCCA, 10%)-malignancies with high mortality. Key hallmarks exhibited by HCC include sustaining proliferative signaling, inducing or accessing vasculature, and avoiding immune detection. Over the past two decades, outcomes for patients with advanced HCC have significantly improved with immunotherapies. iCCA is characterized by hallmarks such as sustaining proliferative signaling, deregulating cellular metabolism, and avoiding immune detection. Unlike HCC, roughly 45% of iCCA harbor alterations amenable to precision oncology approaches, including fibroblast growth factor receptor 2 (FGFR2) fusions, isocitrate dehydrogenase 1 (IDH1) mutations, ERBB2 alterations, and BRAF mutations. In this review, we explore how this framework has reshaped liver cancer care and discuss the resulting breakthroughs in management and emerging directions that may further improve therapeutic strategies.

paper.title: Hallmarks of liver cancer: Therapeutic implications
paper.abstract: The hallmarks of cancer, first proposed in 2000, have since provided a unified framework for understanding the complexity of carcinogenesis. This conceptual model has profoundly influenced the treatment landscape of primary liver cancer, which includes hepatocellular carcinoma (HCC, ∼85%) and intrahepatic cholangiocarcinoma (iCCA, 10%)-malignancies with high mortality. Key hallmarks exhibited by HCC include sustaining proliferative signaling, inducing or accessing vasculature, and avoiding immune detection. Over the past two decades, outcomes for patients with advanced HCC have significantly improved with immunotherapies. iCCA is characterized by hallmarks such as sustaining proliferative signaling, deregulating cellular metabolism, and avoiding immune detection. Unlike HCC, roughly 45% of iCCA harbor alterations amenable to precision oncology approaches, including fibroblast growth factor receptor 2 (FGFR2) fusions, isocitrate dehydrogenase 1 (IDH1) mutations, ERBB2 alterations, and BRAF mutations. In this review, we explore how this framework has reshaped liver cancer care and discuss the resulting breakthroughs in management and emerging directions that may further improve therapeutic strategies.

raw_data.title: SnapShot: The hallmarks of cancer treatment
raw_data.abstract: Cancer therapy evolved from cytotoxic chemotherapy to targeted and immune treatments guided by molecular profiling. Early cytotoxic drugs, rooted in mustard-gas observations, remain effective but toxic. Targeted agents exploit oncogenic vulnerabilities yet commonly select resistant clones. Checkpoint inhibitors and engineered modalities (ADCs, BiTEs, CAR-T) yield responses but are limited by toxicity and adaptive antigen loss. Future treatment combinations will require targeting the evolution of resistance. To view this SnapShot, open or download the PDF.

raw_data.title: A microglia depletion deep dive
raw_data.abstract: PLX5622 is widely used to study microglia in health and disease. In this issue of Neuron, a new manuscript from Cao et al.<sup>1</sup> unveils a non-microglial driver of phenotypes previously attributed to microglia and provides a roadmap for more effectively interpreting microglia depletion studies.

raw_data.title: Two’s company: Astrocytes and microglia team up to refine developing circuits
raw_data.abstract: In this issue ofNeuron, Ramirez et al. identify a mechanism through which astrocytes and microglia interact to refine developing thalamocortical circuits. The C-terminal fragment of astrocyte-derived Hevin binds microglial TLR4, inducing TLR2 expression and increasing synaptic phagocytosis. This astrocyte-microglial crosstalk is essential for the refinement of synapses in the developing brain.

title_zh: 双剑合璧：星形胶质细胞与小胶质细胞协同优化发育中的神经环路
reasoning: 论文直接研究星形胶质细胞与小胶质细胞在发育中 thalamocortical 环路精细调控中的分子机制，属于脑发育与神经环路成熟的核心议题。
feature_angle: 首次揭示星形胶质细胞通过Hevin C端片段与microglial TLR4直接互作，诱导TLR2表达并促进突触吞噬，构成了发育中丘脑-皮层回路精炼的细胞间对话新机制。
key_strength: 发现了星形胶质细胞-小胶质细胞相互作用的新分子通路，将Hevin从突触形成因子重新定位为免疫-突触修剪的桥梁，概念创新性高；摘要中机制链清晰，逻辑自洽。
key_limitation: 仅依据摘要无法评估体内多模态验证（如活体成像、细胞类型特异性敲除）、统计严谨性及是否排除了其他潜在通路；若证据仅限体外或单一标记物，则严谨性存疑。
target_audience: 发育神经生物学家、胶质细胞生物学研究者、突触修剪与环路精炼领域的计算与系统生物学家

raw_data.title: The duality of estrogen
raw_data.abstract: Estrogen enhances cognition under healthy and pathological conditions. In this issue of Neuron, Hokenson et al.<sup>1</sup> describe findings that counter this view, demonstrating that high levels of brain estrogen during acute intense stress impair memory. This preview discusses their findings in context of stress-induced pathology and resilience.

raw_data.title: On the search for language in the cerebellum
raw_data.abstract: Casto et al.<sup>1</sup> carried out an extensive investigation demonstrating the involvement of the cerebellum in linguistic processing and identified a language-specialized area located mainly in posterior Crus I/II. The study offers an analysis of the cerebellum's contribution to language at the level of words and sentences, in comparison with numerous other cognitive and social domains and in relation to the neocortical language network.

raw_data.title: The neuroimmune axis: Integrating two systems to decipher itch
raw_data.abstract: An age-old question in the field of itch research is "why do we experience itch?" Though the physiological reason for acute itch may be clear in the setting of irritants or infections, the mechanisms of pathologic itch remain largely elusive. Ongoing research into the molecular and cellular drivers of chronic pruritus has revealed a palpable synergy between the nervous and immune systems. Classic immune signaling molecules directly activate sensory neurons to evoke itch, while neuropeptides concurrently modulate local immune responses. This bidirectional crosstalk between two widespread systems orchestrates the body's response to environmental stimuli. Here, we review how these neuroimmune interactions drive pathologic itch, with an emphasis on pruritic diseases and novel therapies modulating these pathways. We additionally discuss these mechanisms in the context of different tissues. Deciphering the intricacies of the neuroimmune network has already led to transformative therapies and may ultimately help us understand why we experience itch.

paper.title: The neuroimmune axis: Integrating two systems to decipher itch
paper.abstract: An age-old question in the field of itch research is "why do we experience itch?" Though the physiological reason for acute itch may be clear in the setting of irritants or infections, the mechanisms of pathologic itch remain largely elusive. Ongoing research into the molecular and cellular drivers of chronic pruritus has revealed a palpable synergy between the nervous and immune systems. Classic immune signaling molecules directly activate sensory neurons to evoke itch, while neuropeptides concurrently modulate local immune responses. This bidirectional crosstalk between two widespread systems orchestrates the body's response to environmental stimuli. Here, we review how these neuroimmune interactions drive pathologic itch, with an emphasis on pruritic diseases and novel therapies modulating these pathways. We additionally discuss these mechanisms in the context of different tissues. Deciphering the intricacies of the neuroimmune network has already led to transformative therapies and may ultimately help us understand why we experience itch.

raw_data.title: Spatial and single-cell transcriptomic atlas of human suprachiasmatic nucleus
raw_data.abstract: The suprachiasmatic nucleus (SCN) is considered the master pacemaker of the circadian clock in mammals, but our current knowledge of the SCN is mostly based on rodent studies. Here, we report a comprehensive molecular and cellular atlas for the adult human SCN by spatial transcriptomics, single-nucleus RNA sequencing, and deep-learning-based histological analysis. We identified seven human SCN neuron subtypes with specific transcriptomes and spatial distributions. Comparison of humans, mice, and non-human primates revealed the conserved functional segregation within the SCN regulated by LIM homeobox 1 (LHX1) and RAR-related orphan receptor B (RORB). Furthermore, our results suggested that the human SCN has undergone marked reorganization of its neuropeptide signaling network. Finally, integrative analysis of human SCN transcriptomes and genome-wide association studies (GWASs) identified arginine vasopressin (AVP)/neuromedin S (NMS) subtype as the potential neuronal correlate for morningness chronotype. Thus, our spatial and single-cell transcriptomic atlas of the human SCN provided a basis for the understanding of neural and molecular mechanisms of the human circadian clock.

title_zh: 人类视交叉上核的空间和单细胞转录组图谱
recommendation_text: 该研究首次结合空间转录组学、单核RNA测序和深度学习组织学分析，系统绘制了成人视交叉上核（SCN）的分子细胞图谱。鉴定出七种具有特异转录组和空间分布的人类SCN神经元亚型，并揭示了与非人灵长类和啮齿类动物在LIM同源域调控下的功能保守性与物种差异。这一资源为理解人类昼夜节律的主时钟机制提供了关键分子基础，并可能为睡眠障碍和昼夜节律相关疾病的治疗策略提供新靶点。
reasoning: 该研究直接针对哺乳动物生物钟主起搏器——视交叉上核（SCN）的分子与细胞图谱，涉及神经肽信号网络重组，属于分子与细胞神经科学核心范畴。
feature_angle: 首次绘制人类SCN的空间与单细胞转录组图谱，揭示昼夜节律主时钟在灵长类中的保守性与物种特异性神经肽信号重组。
key_strength: 多模态整合（空间转录组+单核RNA测序+深度学习组织学）系统解析人类SCN细胞类型、空间组织和功能连接，并发现AVP/NMS神经元亚型与晨型表型的GWAS关联，兼具基础机制和临床转化价值。
key_limitation: 样本量可能有限（人类组织获取困难），缺乏功能验证（如光遗传或化学遗传学操作），且GWAS关联仅为相关性，未建立因果机制。
target_audience: 昼夜节律神经科学家、计算生物学家、系统生物学家、临床睡眠医学研究者
editor_note: 该论文代表了人类SCN研究的重要突破，综合利用多组学技术解决了传统基于动物模型认知的局限性。推荐给关注昼夜节律分子机制以及跨物种比较神经科学的读者。

raw_data.title: Artificial intelligence-driven whole-brain cell mapping with highly multiplexedin situhybridization
raw_data.abstract: Murakami et al. developed mFISH3D for multiplexed mRNA staining in whole-mouse organs and human tissue. Analysis of the stained mouse brains using the AI-driven ZenCell platform reveals unique cell populations activated by pharmacological perturbation. This workflow provides a robust approach to studying selective cell vulnerability in disease.

title_zh: 基于人工智能的全脑细胞图谱绘制：高多重原位杂交技术
reasoning: 该研究开发了用于全脑组织的高多重mRNA染色技术，并利用AI分析药物激活的特定神经元群体，直接服务于脑细胞类型鉴定和神经环路功能解析，属于神经科学核心方法学创新。
feature_angle: AI驱动的全脑三维空间转录组学平台，实现细胞分辨率的功能扰动图谱
key_strength: 将AI深度学习与高复用原位杂交结合，首次实现完整小鼠大脑的药理学扰动后全脑细胞类型激活图谱

target_audience: 系统神经科学家、空间转录组学专家、计算生物学家及神经药理学研究者

raw_data.title: Enhancer dynamics and cellular architecture in the human spinal cord
raw_data.abstract: Studies of neurodegenerative disease mechanisms require an understanding of the cellular complexity of the healthy human spinal cord. Here, we report the spatial organization of RNA transcription and associated enhancer dynamics in the adult human spinal cord at single-cell and single-molecule resolution. We expand traditional multi-omic measurements and identify epigenetically poised and bivalent active transcriptional enhancer states that define cell-type specification. Simultaneous detection of chromatin accessibility and histone modifications in spinal cord nuclei reveals previously unobserved cell-type-specific masked enhancer activity, in which transcriptional activation is uncoupled from chromatin accessibility. Such masked enhancers define both stable cell-type identity and transitions between cells undergoing differentiation. We also define gene regulatory networks in glial cells that reorganize along the rostrocaudal axis, demonstrating anatomical differences in gene regulation. Finally, we identify the spatial organization of cells into distinct cellular networks and address the functional significance of this observation in the context of paracrine signaling. We conclude that cellular diversity in the spinal cord is best captured through the lens of enhancer state and intercellular interactions that drive transitions in cellular state.

title_zh: 人类脊髓中的增强子动态与细胞结构
reasoning: 该研究聚焦于成年人类脊髓的转录增强子动态和细胞结构，直接涉及神经系统的细胞类型特化和表观遗传调控机制，属于神经科学核心研究范畴。
feature_angle: 单细胞与单分子分辨率下，首次揭示人类成年脊髓中与染色质可及性解耦的“掩蔽增强子”及其在细胞身份和分化转换中的核心作用。
key_strength: 发现并定义了“掩蔽增强子”这一新型调控状态，将增强子动力学从静态染色质景观中解放出来，对理解细胞身份维持和谱系转换的转录调控机制具有范式革新意义。
key_limitation: 摘要未提及对关键结论（如掩蔽增强子的功能必要性）进行遗传学扰动验证（如CRISPRi/a），结论的因果性尚待在更接近生理的模型中确认；数据来源为尸检组织，可能引入死后RNA降解和表观遗传漂变。
target_audience: 计算与系统生物学家、表观遗传学家、脊髓损伤与神经退行性疾病研究者、单细胞组学技术开发者。

raw_data.title: More than microglial depletion: PLX5622 activates the hepatic constitutive androstane receptor to alter anesthesia and addiction
raw_data.abstract: The colony-stimulating factor 1 receptor (CSF1R) inhibitor PLX5622 has been widely used to deplete microglia for functional characterization and therapeutic support. Although diverse outcomes have been described after PLX5622 treatment, whether these phenotypes solely reflect microglial functions remains to be determined. Here, we show that transgenic microglial depletion did not mimic the accelerated anesthetic arousal or the alleviated nicotine addiction withdrawal symptoms observed after PLX5622 treatment in mice. We further identify that PLX5622 potently activates the mouse constitutive androstane receptor (CAR), leading to prominent induction of hepatic enzymes. The induced enzymatic activity enhances the metabolism and clearance of anesthetics and nicotine, thereby contributing to anesthetic insensitivity and addiction relief. Inactivation of CAR abolished these effects of PLX5622, indicating that the impact of PLX5622 treatment cannot be attributed exclusively to microglial depletion. Our findings raise awareness in evaluating consequences of PLX5622 treatment and provide insights into the design of specific CSF1R inhibitors.

paper.title: More than microglial depletion: PLX5622 activates the hepatic constitutive androstane receptor to alter anesthesia and addiction
paper.abstract: The colony-stimulating factor 1 receptor (CSF1R) inhibitor PLX5622 has been widely used to deplete microglia for functional characterization and therapeutic support. Although diverse outcomes have been described after PLX5622 treatment, whether these phenotypes solely reflect microglial functions remains to be determined. Here, we show that transgenic microglial depletion did not mimic the accelerated anesthetic arousal or the alleviated nicotine addiction withdrawal symptoms observed after PLX5622 treatment in mice. We further identify that PLX5622 potently activates the mouse constitutive androstane receptor (CAR), leading to prominent induction of hepatic enzymes. The induced enzymatic activity enhances the metabolism and clearance of anesthetics and nicotine, thereby contributing to anesthetic insensitivity and addiction relief. Inactivation of CAR abolished these effects of PLX5622, indicating that the impact of PLX5622 treatment cannot be attributed exclusively to microglial depletion. Our findings raise awareness in evaluating consequences of PLX5622 treatment and provide insights into the design of specific CSF1R inhibitors.

title_zh: 超越小胶质细胞耗竭：PLX5622激活肝组成性雄烷受体以改变麻醉和成瘾行为
recommendation_text: 本研究颠覆了当前小胶质细胞研究领域的一个核心假设：PLX5622的作用并非仅通过清除小胶质细胞实现。通过转基因模型对比，作者发现PLX5622加速麻醉苏醒和缓解尼古丁戒断症状的表型无法被小胶质细胞清除所模拟，而是源于该药物对肝脏组成型雄烷受体（CAR）的强效激活，进而改变药物代谢与行为效应。这一发现对依赖PLX5622研究小胶质细胞功能的数百篇论文提出了根本性挑战，提醒研究者必须区分药物脱靶效应与细胞特异性功能。对于神经科学读者，尤其是研究神经免疫、成瘾机制及麻醉药理的学者，本文提供了关键的控制实验思路和药物作用新维度。
reasoning: 该研究揭示CSF1R抑制剂PLX5622通过非小胶质细胞途径（激活肝CAR酶系）影响麻醉觉醒和尼古丁成瘾戒断症状，虽非直接神经机制，但对解释神经药理学研究中广泛使用的工具药副作用具有颠覆性意义，可能重塑对微胶质功能研究的理解。
feature_angle: PLX5622的肝代谢意外激活效应警示神经免疫研究中的工具药陷阱
key_strength: 首次系统揭示CSF1R抑制剂PLX5622通过激活肝脏CAR通路非特异性影响麻醉和成瘾行为，颠覆了“小胶质细胞耗竭”的因果推论，具有跨领域的方法学警示价值
key_limitation: 仅在小鼠模型中验证，缺乏人类肝细胞或非人灵长类的数据支撑；CAR激活的代谢谱可能仅限于特定化合物，推广至其他CSF1R抑制剂需进一步验证
target_audience: 神经免疫学家、药物代谢毒理学家、成瘾神经生物学研究者、小胶质细胞工具药使用者
editor_note: 高影响力警示性研究，对使用CSF1R抑制剂进行功能丧失实验的领域具有里程碑式的校正意义。

raw_data.title: Astrocyte-microglia crosstalk through Hevin and Toll-like receptor signaling controls developmental thalamocortical synapse refinement
raw_data.abstract: Synapse formation and elimination are two crucial processes that occur concurrently in the developing brain. Astrocytes and microglia control both processes, yet how these two major glial cell types of the central nervous system (CNS) communicate to balance synapse formation and elimination is unknown. Astrocytes secrete the synaptogenic protein Hevin/SPARCL1, which induces the formation and plasticity of thalamocortical synapses in the mouse visual cortex. Here, we found that, in addition to this synaptogenic function, Hevin directly signals to microglia by interacting with Toll-like receptor 4 (TLR4). This signaling occurs when Hevin is proteolytically cleaved, producing a C-terminal fragment that is no longer synaptogenic. We found that Hevin, through TLR4, induces a distinct microglial state defined by increased TLR2 expression and phago-lysosomal content in vitro and in vivo. Microglial TLR4 signaling is required for the proper elimination of thalamocortical synapses during early postnatal development.

title_zh: 星形胶质细胞与小胶质细胞通过Hevin和Toll样受体信号传导的交互调控发育中的丘脑-皮层突触精细化
reasoning: 研究聚焦发育期视觉皮层中丘脑-皮层突触形成与消除的胶质细胞间信号机制，直接涉及神经发育关键过程，属于核心神经科学领域。
feature_angle: 揭示星形胶质细胞分泌的Hevin蛋白通过TLR4信号直接调控小胶质细胞吞噬功能，从而控制丘脑-皮层突触修剪的胶质细胞间新回路。
key_strength: 首次发现Hevin蛋白的蛋白水解片段作为小胶质细胞TLR4配体，建立了星形胶质细胞直接调控小胶质细胞突触修剪的分子机制，填补了胶质细胞互作调控发育性突触细化的关键空白。
key_limitation: 主要依赖小鼠视觉皮层模型，Hevin-TLR4信号在其它脑区或物种中的普适性尚未验证；TLR4下游信号通路的具体分子细节有待深入。
target_audience: 神经发育生物学家、胶质细胞生物学家、突触可塑性研究者、免疫-神经交叉领域学者

raw_data.title: Hippocampal estrogen levels, receptor types, and epigenetics contribute to sex-specific memory vulnerabilities to concurrent acute stresses
raw_data.abstract: It is increasingly recognized that acute traumatic events (e.g., mass shootings, natural disasters) can provoke enduring episodic memory deficits and generalization of trauma cues, and these are more common in women. We investigated the mechanisms and sex differences in memory vulnerability to multiple acute concurrent stresses (MACSs) in mice, focusing on the sex hormone 17β-estradiol and its receptors in the hippocampus. Surprisingly, high physiological hippocampal estradiol levels, observed in proestrus females and males, were required for MACS-induced episodic memory disruption and sensitization and generalization of stress cues. High estradiol levels were associated with permissive chromatin states in stress-vulnerable mice, while chromatin permissiveness and hippocampal estradiol were low in stress-resilient estrus females. Estrogen receptor (ER)β activation in resilient estrus females increased chromatin permissiveness and enduring vulnerability to MACSs, while ERα mediated milder stress-induced memory disruptions in males. Thus, hippocampal estradiol levels and sex modify chromatin states to enable long-lasting memory vulnerabilities to MACSs.

title_zh: 海马雌激素水平、受体类型及表观遗传学导致性别特异性的记忆脆弱性，使其易于受到并发急性应激的影响
reasoning: 该研究关注海马中雌激素水平及其表观遗传机制对性别特异性记忆脆弱性的调控，直接涉及神经内分泌、突触可塑性和应激反应，属于分子与细胞神经科学核心领域。
feature_angle: 揭示高生理水平海马雌二醇（而非低水平）竟是急性应激诱发记忆损伤和性别差异的关键开关，颠覆了传统神经内分泌应激保护的认知。
key_strength: 首次在体内实验层面证明高生理浓度海马雌二醇及其受体（ERβ/ERα）通过表观遗传状态（染色质开放度）决定急性应激后的记忆脆弱性，提供了从激素-受体-染色质-行为的完整逻辑链。
key_limitation: 仅依赖小鼠模型和急性应激范式（MACS），缺乏在人类创伤后记忆泛化障碍中的直接验证，且ERβ操纵的因果关系实验是否完全排除其他非特异性效应（如全身性激素波动）尚需严谨确认。
target_audience: 神经内分泌学家、记忆与应激研究人员、性别差异生物学家、表观遗传调控领域学者。

raw_data.title: Hippocampal place code plasticity in CA1 requires postsynaptic membrane fusion
raw_data.abstract: Rapid delivery of glutamate receptors to the postsynaptic membrane via vesicle fusion is a central component of synaptic plasticity. However, it is unknown how this process supports specific neural computations during behavior. To bridge this gap, we combined hippocampal CA1 deletion of the t-SNARE protein Syntaxin3 (Stx3), a component of the postsynaptic membrane fusion machinery, with population in vivo calcium imaging. This approach revealed that Stx3 is necessary for neural responses to novelty and for forming stable representations of rewarded locations. By contrast, CA1 Stx3 is dispensable for maintaining aspects of the neural code that exist presynaptic to CA1, such as representations of context and space. Thus, altering the Stx3-dependent postsynaptic membrane fusion machinery identified computations that specifically require synaptic restructuring via membrane trafficking in CA1 and distinguished them from neural representations that could be inherited from upstream brain regions or learned through other mechanisms.

feature_angle: 首次在清醒行为动物中，利用基因敲除结合钙成像，将突触后膜融合这一分子事件与具体的海马神经编码计算（新颖性、奖赏位置表征）因果性地剥离出来。

raw_data.title: Recurrent cortical networks encode natural sensory statistics via sequence filtering
raw_data.abstract: Recurrent neural networks can generate dynamics, but in the sensory cortex, it has been unclear if any dynamic processing is supported by the dense recurrent excitatory-excitatory network. Here, we show a role for recurrent connections in the mouse visual cortex: they support powerful dynamical computations, but by filtering sequences of input instead of generating sequences. Using two-photon optogenetics, we measure neural responses to natural images and play them back, finding that responses are boosted when inputs are played back during the correct movie dynamic context-when the preceding sequence corresponds to natural vision. This sequence selectivity depends on a network mechanism: earlier input patterns produce responses in other local neurons, which interact with later input patterns. We confirm this mechanism by designing sequences of inputs that are boosted or attenuated by the network. These data suggest that recurrent cortical connections perform predictive processing, encoding the statistics of the natural world in input-output transformations.

raw_data.title: The cerebellar components of the human language network
raw_data.abstract: Despite ample evidence of cerebellar contributions to cognition, including language, its precise role remains debated. We systematically characterize cerebellar language-responsive regions using precision fMRI. We identify four cerebellar regions that respond to language across modalities (experiments 1a and 1b, n = 754). One region-spanning Crus I/II/lobule VIIb-is selective for language relative to diverse non-linguistic tasks (experiments 2a-2f, n = 732), and the rest exhibit mixed selectivity. Similar to the neocortical language system, the language-selective region is engaged during comprehension and production (experiments 3a and 3b, n = 100), shows sensitivity to linguistic difficulty (experiment 3c, n = 5), and responds to both social and nonsocial sentences (experiment 3d, n = 10). Finally, all four regions, but especially Crus I/II/VIIb, are functionally connected to the neocortical language system (experiment 4, n = 85). We propose that these cerebellar regions constitute components of the extended language network, with one region closely mirroring the neocortical network and the rest plausibly integrating information from diverse neocortical regions.

raw_data.title: Storms, budworms and vagrant birds in a changing world
raw_data.abstract: The seasonal migration of billions of birds is one of the most spectacular events in the natural world's annual cycle. Migration lets birds exploit spatiotemporally dynamic resources and involves complex trade-offs for survivorship. The migratory movements of individual birds are routinely influenced by atmospheric and ecological connections across long distances. Suboptimal conditions during active migration often lead to bird displacement, sometimes en masse. Birds that are displaced outside of their regular geographic ranges are known as vagrants, arguably the most spectacular instances of which involve transoceanic and transhemispheric movements of small songbirds. Vagrants have been catalogued by amateur ornithologists for decades, but there is now a renewed scientific interest in the causes and consequences of vagrancy - in particular as a prelude to range shifts that are prone to become more likely under global change. Against the backdrop of an unprecedented arrival of vagrant North American songbirds in Western Europe in September 2023, we discuss the environmental drivers that influenced this transoceanic movement and the latest scientific literature exploring the phenomenon.

raw_data.title: Synthetic mechanobiology
raw_data.abstract: Cells do not simply endure mechanical forces - they generate, transmit, and interpret them as biological signals. From membrane tension and receptor pulling to substrate stiffness and fluid shear, physical inputs shape migration, differentiation, immune function, and tissue organization. Whereas mechanobiology seeks to understand how living systems read these cues, synthetic mechanobiology treats mechanoregulatory pathways as an input-output relationship that can be deliberately programmed. Integrating tools from synthetic biology with mechanobiological principles, this emerging field reframes force-sensing as a design problem in which mechanical signaling is rewired to achieve useful outcomes - and in which the act of rewiring can itself serve as a powerful investigational strategy. Here, I survey the molecular mechanisms of mechanosensing, describe their use as modular mechanogenetic parts, and discuss applications and open challenges. The long-term vision is to build engineered cells that not only read tissue mechanics but act on them, turning the physical signatures of disease into precise, locally delivered therapeutic programs.

title_zh: 合成力学生物学
recommendation_text: 尽管传统神经科学主要关注化学与电信号传递，但机械力在神经元迁移、轴突导向、突触可塑性及神经发育中扮演着关键角色。本文系统性地阐述了如何将合成生物学工具（如光遗传力学受体、可编程基底刚度）应用于细胞机械信号通路的解析与重编程，为神经科学领域提供了一种前所未有的研究范式：通过人工控制机械输入来探究神经系统发育与病变中的物理信号解码机制，有助于推动神经修复与脑机接口中的力学适配设计。
reasoning: 该论文聚焦于力学信号与合成生物学整合，不直接涉及神经系统的结构或功能，但机械力感知与传导是神经发育、突触可塑性等过程的关键，未来可能推动神经科学中对力学转导机制的理解与工程化调控。
feature_angle: 将力学生物学转化为可编程的合成生物学模块，为神经力学信号操控提供新框架。
key_strength: 明确提出合成力学生物学的概念，系统整合机械感应分子机制与合成生物学工具，构建模块化设计范式，对理解神经发育、突触可塑性及神经元力学响应有直接迁移价值。
key_limitation: 综述性文章缺乏原创实验数据；机械力转导在神经特异性中的应用实例不足；作者h-index和引用量相对偏低，领域影响力尚未充分验证。
target_audience: 对力学-生物学交叉感兴趣的计算生物学家、合成生物学家、研究神经力学及细胞骨架的神经科学家、以及探索生物物理信号在神经疾病中应用的转化研究者。
crossover_value: 对神经科学读者而言，该文的跨界价值在于：首次明确定义了‘合成生物力学’这一框架，将长期被忽视的机械信号调控从描述性观察提升至可编程工程层面。神经发育、胶质细胞功能、血脑屏障完整性乃至神经退行性疾病中机械微环境失调已被初步证实，本文提供了直接的工具箱与设计原则，使研究者能够主动操纵力学参数并量化神经系统的响应，从而揭示此前通过药理或遗传手段难以触及的机制。
editor_note: 得分7.1/10，属域外高影响阈值边界，但因概念体系完整且工具学创新显著，强烈推荐关注。建议结合神经科学中特定力学场景（如轴突生长锥力感知、小胶质细胞基质刚度检测）进行延伸阅读。

raw_data.title: Small canopy species drive information highways about predators in an Amazonian rainforest
raw_data.abstract: Interspecies communication networks about threats can shape animal communities, as many species produce alarm calls while eavesdropping on those of others, resulting in information flow crossing ecological niches and taxonomic boundaries<sup>1</sup><sup>,</sup><sup>2</sup><sup>,</sup><sup>3</sup>. Some species contribute disproportionately to these networks by being particularly vigilant, accurate in predator detection, and consistent in alarm call production. These key informants influence how others perceive danger and produce information used across taxonomic groups<sup>4</sup><sup>,</sup><sup>5</sup><sup>,</sup><sup>6</sup>. As well, predator encounters by themselves could also alter the soundscape more broadly by producing brief risk-related cues that reach many listeners<sup>7</sup>. However, information about how predator-related information spreads across animal communities remains poorly understood.

raw_data.title: A disabled kea parrot is the alpha male of his circus
raw_data.abstract: How physical disability affects social rank remains poorly understood<sup>1</sup><sup>,</sup><sup>2</sup>. Contest theory predicts that asymmetries decide fights: the larger, better-armed competitor typically prevails<sup>3</sup>. Bruce, an endangered kea parrot (Nestor notabilis) missing his entire upper beak, has previously innovated to survive - using pebbles as self-care tools<sup>4</sup>. Here, we report that he has also innovated to thrive in his captive environment. Bruce is the alpha male of his circus (the collective noun for a group of kea): despite being the only disabled bird in his group, he was undefeated in dominance interactions with his male peers, exhibited the lowest stress hormone metabolites, had priority access to feeding stations, received the only allopreening directed toward a non-mate (Figures 1 and S1), and achieved this without allies. His weapon? A novel beak jousting technique (Figure S1 and Video S1) that turned his disability into dominance. These results show how behavioural innovation can dramatically reverse the consequences of disability in animals.

raw_data.title: Multi-species foraging on a Marburg virus bat reservoir
raw_data.abstract: Understanding zoonotic spillover requires observation of reservoir-host interfaces, yet direct multi-species behavioral data remain rare. During long-term carnivore monitoring in Queen Elizabeth National Park, Uganda, we deployed camera traps at Python Cave, a roost for Egyptian fruit bats (Rousettus aegyptiacus) and known Marburg-virus reservoir. Over the course of 368 trap nights, we recorded > 14 vertebrate species engaging in predation, scavenging, guano foraging, or exploration across 321 events, alongside 214 human visitors. The shallow cave structure collapses spatial separation between reservoir hosts, predators, and people. These observations provide visual evidence of a multi-trophic exposure network at a known filovirus reservoir.

raw_data.abstract: Electric fishes rely on electrosensory signals to sense their world in complete darkness. These signals, however, are conspicuous to nearby fishes. A recent study shows how predatory electric eels and their weakly electric prey pause electrogenesis to avoid detection.

raw_data.title: Plant response to and recovery from drought
raw_data.abstract: Drought is a pervasive stress limiting plant growth and survival across ecosystems, and its frequency and severity are rising with climate change, threatening global food and ecological security. While major progress has been made in understanding plant responses to water deficits, an integrative framework spanning molecular to ecosystem scales remains incomplete. Moreover, the recovery processes following drought - crucial for long-term performance and ecosystem resilience - are still understudied. Here, we synthesize recent advances in plant responses to drought and rewatering, linking gene regulation, biochemical and physiological responses, plant growth, community dynamics, and ecosystem functions. We highlight the central roles of abscisic acid and other hormonal signals in stomatal regulation, osmotic adjustment, and stress-induced gene expression. At the physiological level, we discuss shifts in photosynthetic capacity and phenology during drought and recovery. We further examine how precipitation variability shapes vegetation productivity via biodiversity, and how soil microbial communities mediate plant-soil feedback that sustains ecosystem functioning. Finally, we assess how warming and elevated CO<sub>2</sub> modify drought impacts and outline key research priorities to integrate multi-scale insights into breeding, management, and conservation strategies for drought-resilient ecosystems.

raw_data.title: Divergent nectar-feeding mechanisms evidenced by intralingual suction in sunbirds
raw_data.abstract: Nectarivory has independently evolved many times among birds, yet little is known about the diversity of feeding mechanisms that enable specialized taxa to efficiently collect this energy-rich resource. Multiple avian groups have converged on evolving elongated bills and tube-like tongues adapted for nectar extraction. Old World sunbirds (family Nectariniidae) stand out as having the greatest degree of convergence in bill and tongue morphology with the well-studied and highly specialized New World hummingbirds (family Trochilidae), which fill their tongues via fluid trapping and expansive filling. However, using museum specimens, high-speed video, and fluid modeling, we show that sunbirds use a unique drinking mechanism not found in any other animal: intralingual suction. Using tube-like tongues, sunbirds are able to move nectar from flowers to their mouths by generating a pressure differential along the length of the tongue, a remarkable feat for animals without lips or cheeks. We show how this feeding mechanism works and how it can be modeled mathematically. This discovery raises new questions for both vertebrate and invertebrate groups that feed on liquid food, and we anticipate that our results will be used to evaluate both food capture mechanisms and their efficiencies. For example, knowing the feeding mechanism allows the energy intake rate to be accurately predicted and tested, leading to reliable energy budget models and minimum requirements that, in turn, circumscribe more complex ecological interactions. VIDEO ABSTRACT.

raw_data.title: Mechanosensitive feedback organizes cell shape and motion during hindbrain neuropore morphogenesis
raw_data.abstract: Neural tube closure is a critical morphogenetic process in vertebrate development, and failure to close cranial regions such as the hindbrain neuropore (HNP) leads to severe congenital malformations. While mechanical forces such as actomyosin purse-string contraction and directional cell crawling have been implicated in driving HNP closure, how these forces organize local cell shape and motion to produce large-scale tissue remodeling remains poorly understood. Using live and fixed imaging of mouse embryos combined with cell-based biophysical modeling, we show that these force-generating mechanisms are insufficient to explain the reproducible patterns of cell elongation and nematic alignment observed at the HNP border. Instead, we show that local anisotropic stress and cytoskeletal organization are required to generate these patterns and promote midline cell motion. Our model captures key features of cell shape dynamics and emergent nematic order, which we confirm experimentally, including the alignment of actin fibers with cell shape and enhanced midline cell speed. Comparative analysis with chick embryos, which lack supracellular purse strings, supports a conserved link between tension generation and cellular patterning. These findings establish a physical framework connecting force generation, cell shape anisotropy, and tissue morphodynamics during epithelial gap closure.

raw_data.title: Testing Weismann’s germ plasm theory inArabidopsis
raw_data.abstract: Guo et al. employ a dynamic editing approach to trace cell lineages inArabidopsis. Their findings reveal two origins of germline cells: some germline cells segregate during inflorescence meristem formation, while others segregate earlier than branch formation—akin to the Weismann barrier traditionally associated with animal development.

raw_data.title: Antagonism between blue- and red-light signaling controls thallus flatness inMarchantia polymorpha
raw_data.abstract: Roetzer et al. demonstrate that flat thallus growth in the liverwortMarchantia polymorphais maintained by antagonistic red- and blue-light signaling. MpPHY promotes epinasty, and MpPHOT promotes hyponasty. MpBBX1 and MpBBX5 are light-induced transcription factors that promote epinastic and hyponastic thallus growth, respectively.

raw_data.title: A microbiome-derived olfactory signal regulates inter-male aggression and social dominance in mice
raw_data.abstract: Many species use microbiome-derived metabolites as chemosensory cues, yet the chemicals involved and the sensory pathways that detect and process them remain poorly understood. Trimethylamine (TMA) is a volatile metabolite that is produced by the gut microbiome and selectively accumulated in the urine of sexually mature male mice. Here, we show that TMA regulates inter-male aggression and social dominance by activating trace amine-associated receptor 5 (TAAR5) in the main olfactory system. In wild-type mice, early aggressive behavior during male-male encounters strongly predicts eventual social status: dominant males initiate more attacks, whereas subordinate males display more defensive behaviors. Deletion of TAAR5 eliminated this asymmetry, with dominant and subordinate mice showing similar levels of aggressive and defensive behaviors. Strikingly, restoring TAAR5 expression in olfactory sensory neurons (OSNs) rescued the behavioral asymmetry, indicating that this effect is mediated by the main olfactory system and arguing against contributions from proposed TAAR5 expression in the brain. Finally, pharmacological suppression of microbial TMA production reduced inter-male aggression, and this effect was reversed by painting treated males with TMA, showing that microbiome-derived TMA is the key volatile ligand for TAAR5 in this context. Taken together, our findings identify TMA as a critical olfactory cue that signals the presence of sexually mature males and facilitates social hierarchy formation. More broadly, our results demonstrate that a microbiome-derived metabolite can shape mammalian social interactions through the main olfactory system and uncover a previously unrecognized role for the TAAR family in regulating social behavior.

title_zh: 微生物组衍生的嗅觉信号调控小鼠间攻击行为和社会优势地位
reasoning: 研究揭示了肠道微生物代谢物三甲胺通过主嗅觉系统中的TAAR5受体调控小鼠间攻击行为和社会等级，直接涉及嗅觉感觉通路和社会行为的神经机制。
feature_angle: 首次鉴定肠道菌群代谢物TMA通过嗅觉受体TAAR5调控小鼠雄性攻击行为和社会等级的形成，揭示了一条宿主-微生物组-嗅觉社会的完整神经环路。
key_strength: 证据链条完整闭环：从分子（TMA→TAAR5）、细胞（嗅觉神经元特异性敲除与回补）、行为（攻击与防御不对称性消除与恢复）到微生物组（药理学抑制TMA产生并外源补充回补表型），多层面严谨验证，且排除了非嗅觉系统的混杂表达。
key_limitation: 突破性稍弱：虽首次建立TMA-TAAR5-攻击行为的直接联系，但肠道代谢物调控社会行为的范式已被其他研究（如小鼠尿液信息素）部分铺垫，而非完全颠覆性发现；另外，TMA作为“成熟雄性气味”的生态学普遍性（是否仅限于实验室品系或野生环境）未充分讨论。

raw_data.title: Specialized high-capacity mitochondria fuel cell invasion
raw_data.abstract: Cell invasion through basement membrane (BM) is energetically intensive. How cells produce high ATP levels to power invasion is understudied. By endogenously tagging 20 mitochondrial proteins, we identified a specialized mitochondrial subpopulation within the C. elegans anchor cell (AC) that localizes to the BM breaching site and generates elevated ATP levels to fuel invasion. These electron transport chain (ETC)-enriched high-capacity mitochondria are compositionally unique, harboring increased protein import machinery and dense cristae enriched with ETC components. High-capacity mitochondria emerge at the time of AC specification and depend on the AC pro-invasive transcriptional program. Finally, we show that netrin signaling through an Src kinase directs microtubule polarization, facilitating metaxin adaptor complex-dependent ETC-enriched mitochondrial trafficking to the AC invasive front. Our studies reveal that an invasive cell produces high ATP levels by generating and localizing high-capacity mitochondria. This might be a common strategy used by other cells to meet the energetically demanding processes.

raw_data.title: Organismal robustness and resilience to declining temperature predict reproductive outcomes in a wild bird
raw_data.abstract: Coping with challenges often requires maintaining performance during poor conditions (robustness) and reestablishing normal performance following disturbance (resilience). Trade-offs between performance under normal and challenging conditions may generate variation in stress-coping capacity, but there are few empirical data to test this idea from wild populations. We studied robustness and resilience to declining temperatures in tree swallows (Tachycineta bicolor) using a 39-year dataset. Prolonged periods of cold conditions had profound and sustained impacts on adults and nestlings, including negative associations with mass, growth, and survival. We used over 75,000 h of automated behavioral monitoring data to characterize individual differences in the behavioral robustness and resilience of incubation-bout length and provisioning rates to declining temperatures. Using these estimates, we found that the effects of temperature on nestlings were attenuated by higher robustness and resilience of parental behaviors. Higher levels of parental robustness were, in turn, associated with both developmental cold exposure and baseline corticosterone. As expected, trade-offs between mean behavioral levels and behavioral robustness modulated susceptibility to declining temperatures, with higher mean performance improving outcomes but lower robustness increasing vulnerability. Selection on these trade-offs may generate population differences in vulnerability to changing temperature regimes.

raw_data.title: Cocaine pollution alters the movement and space use of Atlantic salmon (Salmo salar) in a large natural lake
raw_data.abstract: Cocaine and its metabolites are increasingly being detected in aquatic environments worldwide. While previous research has demonstrated that these substances can affect brain function and behavior in wildlife, this research has exclusively been conducted under artificial laboratory conditions. How cocaine pollution affects animal behavior in the wild is, thus, unknown. Here, we combine slow-release chemical implants with acoustic telemetry tracking to reveal how environmentally realistic levels of cocaine and its main metabolite, benzoylecgonine, affect the movement of Atlantic salmon (Salmo salar) smolts in a large natural lake (Lake Vättern, Sweden). Benzoylecgonine exposure increased weekly movement rates of fish in the wild, with exposed fish swimming up to ∼1.9 times farther per week relative to controls. In addition, benzoylecgonine-exposed fish dispersed up to ∼12.3 km farther than control conspecifics. These results indicate that cocaine-derived pollutants can alter fish spatial ecology, potentially influencing habitat use, trophic interactions, and population-level dispersal patterns in natural ecosystems.
